reasoning: The Lean statement uses `[CommRing R] [IsDomain R]`, which in Mathlib corresponds exactly to the classical notion of an integral domain (commutative, nontrivial, and having the cancellation / no-zero-divisor property, per `Mathlib/Algebra/Ring/Defs.lean`).
